channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: CAPHRA Criticizes Media for Misrepresenting Vaping Risks and Urges Accurate Scientific Reporting
item.description: The Coalition of Asia Pacific Tobacco Harm Reduction Advocates (CAPHRA) has criticized recent media coverage of an Australian study that linked vaping to cancer, arguing that the reports exaggerated t...

item.title: Google Launches Offline AI Dictation App 'Google AI Edge Eloquent' for iOS
item.description: Google has quietly launched a new AI-powered dictation app for iOS called “Google AI Edge Eloquent.” This experimental app distinguishes itself by offering offline functionality and AI-driven text ref...

item.title: £200k Stolen from Scouts Fund, Trip to Canada Cancelled for 100 Children
item.description: A man has been arrested on suspicion of stealing approximately £200,000 from a fundraising account intended for a Scouts trip to Canada. The theft has left 100 children from Herefordshire and Worceste...

item.title: Vijay Criticises DMK-Led Alliance, Claims Real Congress Supports TVK
item.description: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) chief Vijay has sharply criticised the ruling DMK in Tamil Nadu, asserting that Chief Minister MK Stalin is 'powerless' and would have obstructed the Tirunelveli event i...

item.title: Ouaddou Highlights Importance of Pirates' Goal Scoring in Title Race
item.description: Orlando Pirates' coach Abdeslam Ouaddou has expressed confidence in his team's recent attacking form as they aim to close the gap on league leaders Mamelodi Sundowns. Following a dominant 5-0 win over...

item.title: DOE says impact of US-Iran ceasefire on Philippine fuel prices remains uncertain
item.description: The Philippine Department of Energy (DOE) has expressed uncertainty about how the recently announced US-Iran ceasefire will affect global and local fuel prices. Energy Secretary Sharon Garin, speaking...

item.title: Planet Labs Implements AI Object Detection on Satellites for Faster Analysis
item.description: Planet Labs has successfully tested an AI-powered object detection system on a satellite orbiting Earth. The satellite, which was positioned about 500 kilometers above the planet's surface, captured a...

item.title: EACC Trains Over 80 Recruits to Reinforce Kenya’s Fight Against Corruption
item.description: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) has kicked off a two-week induction training for more than 80 freshly recruited officers at the Kenya School of Government, signaling a stronger renewe...

item.title: Nigerian DJs Union suspend Burna Boy’s music after clash with DJ Tunez, start investigation
item.description: The Nigerian DJs Association (NDJ) don suspend Burna Boy music from their members' playlists after him and DJ Tunez reportedly get physical quarrel for Lagos. According to wetin Premium Times gather, ...

item.title: Fiji Airways flight diverted to Tonga due to Cyclone Vaianu's severe weather
item.description: A Fiji Airways flight from Sydney to Nadi, Fiji, was forced to divert to Tonga after Severe Tropical Cyclone Vaianu made safe landing impossible. The aircraft attempted to land three times at Nadi Int...

item.title: Samia and Mwinyi lead Karume Day commemoration in Zanzibar
item.description: On April 7, 2026, President Samia Suluhu Hassan and Zanzibar President Hussein Ali Mwinyi commemorated 54 years since the death of Sheikh Abeid Amani Karume, Zanzibar's first president. The ceremony, ...

item.title: Fire Quickly Contained at Hollywood’s Magic Castle; Damage Still Being Assessed
item.description: A fire broke out Tuesday evening in the attic of Hollywood’s famed Magic Castle, a century-old mansion that houses the Academy of Magical Arts. Firefighters from the Los Angeles Fire Department were d...

item.title: Hillary Clinton's 2016 Tweet Highlights Risks of Trump's Use of Social Media in Crisis
item.description: A tweet posted by Hillary Clinton in July 2016 has resurfaced amid concerns about President Donald Trump's recent provocative messages regarding Iran. In the tweet, Clinton warned, “A man you can bait...

item.title: Madagascar announces energy emergency as Middle East conflict disrupts supplies
item.description: Madagascar has declared a 15-day nationwide state of energy emergency due to significant disruptions in its energy supply, which officials have linked to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, speci...

item.title: Manila RTC permits detained witness Ramil Madriaga to appear in Sara Duterte impeachment hearing
item.description: The Manila Regional Trial Court (RTC), Branch 21, has approved the request of the House Committee on Justice to allow detainee Ramil Lagunoy Madriaga to testify in the ongoing impeachment proceedings ...

item.title: TMC's Derek O'Brien criticises CEC after abrupt meeting on Bengal election issues
item.description: In a heated exchange on Wednesday, Trinamool Congress (TMC) leader Derek O'Brien shared the details of a brief and tense meeting with Chief Election Commissioner (CEC) Gyanesh Kumar. According to O'Br...

item.title: US and Iran Agree on Temporary Ceasefire, Discuss 10-Point Peace Plan
item.description: Dem say United States and Iran don reach agreement for two-week ceasefire wey stop war wey don dey kill plenty people for Middle East since February 28. Dis war start after US and Israel launch coordi...

item.title: Rockets Overcome Deficit, Defeat Phoenix in Durant's Return
item.description: The Houston Rockets pulled off a remarkable comeback victory against the Phoenix Suns on Tuesday, April 8, 2026, in a game marked by the return of Kevin Durant. The Rockets, initially trailing, mounte...

item.title: Two Young Men Indicted for ISIS-Inspired Bombing Attempt Outside NYC Mayor's Residence
item.description: Federal authorities have indicted two men, Ibrahim Kayumi, 19, and Emir Balat, 18, for allegedly attempting a terrorist attack during a protest outside New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's Gracie Mans...

item.title: Gina Rinehart defends Ben Roberts-Smith and calls for compassion amid war crimes charges
item.description: Mining billionaire Gina Rinehart has strongly criticised the prosecution of former soldier Ben Roberts-Smith, who was charged by Australian Federal Police with five counts of war crimes, including mur...
